chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.1436 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 25.08.2025 None present for the applicant. Mr. Tahir Hussain Mangi, APG Sindh. ------------------------------- No one is present on behalf of the applicant. Same was the position on last date of hearing. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
